productDisplayName: Clarks Men Gofor Action Brown Casual Shoe
description: This clarks men Gofor Life two tone ankle boot is the essence of the brand's signature style. This shoe has the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing and high-top. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Leather high-top upper for durability and style Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Zipper on the lateral side of the foot for a customised Fit Midsole TPR midsole referencing wood Outsole Slip-resistant TPR outsole for better shock absorption and grip Textured patterning on the outsole for enhanced traction Stacked heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
